arts.ttl: Why Mikel Arteta is unhappy ahead of Arsenal's clash with Newcastle as he delivers 'final' vow
arts.sum: "We had a clear intention… we have not achieved it," Arteta said in his press conference ahead of tomorrow night's Carabao Cup semi-final second leg. It left Arteta frustrated that he couldn't add to his ranks as Arsenal look to overturn a 2-0 first leg deficit against Newcastle at St James' Park on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta 'DISAPPOINTED' by Arsenal's lack of January transfer business
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has admitted that he is “disappointed” by the club’s failure to sign a new forward during the January transfer window. Mikel Arteta 'DISAPPOINTED' by Arsenal's lack of January transfer business

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta ‘disappointed’ at Arsenal’s lack of January transfer activity
arts.sum: Manager has wanted reinforcements in depleted attack ‘We’re going to have to be very flexible in the front line’ Mikel Arteta has admitted disappointment with Arsenal’s lack of signings in the recent transfer window and acknowledged they will have to be “flexible in the frontline” to cope with the lack of attacking options at his disposal. It was a frustrating deadline day for the Arsenal manager, who had made it clear that he wanted to bring in reinforcements to replace the injured Bukayo Saka and Gabriel Jesus but ended up not replenishing his squad. A bid for Ollie Watkins, believed to have been worth around £40m, was rejected by Aston Villa last week, with Arsenal also deciding not to follow up their interest in Bayern Munich forward Mathys Tel, who joined Tottenham on loan instead. arts.ttl: Arteta: Arsenal going 'full gas' at Newcastle after 'disappointing' window
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has insisted his side are preparing to go "full gas" against Newcastle United in their Carabao Cup semi-final despite a "disappointing" end to the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Striker has scored three goals in just two games for new club after Arsenal rejected chance to sign him
Arteta 'disappointed' by lack of Arsenal signings
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has admitted his disappointment at Arsenal's failure to sign a striker in the January transfer window but believes the club need to stay "very disciplined" to remain on track.

arts.ttl: Ryan Reynolds splashed out on ex-Man Utd star and player who snubbed Liverpool and Arsenal
arts.sum: Wrexham have been busy in the January transfer window, adding three new faces to their ranks as Phil Parkinson's side look to secure Championship status for next season

arts.ttl: Arsenal: Mikel Arteta confirms Dubai training camp after Carabao Cup semi-final
arts.sum: The Gunners are repeating past successful trips, but with a few tweaks

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta ‘disappointed’ that Arsenal failed to sign a striker
arts.sum: A frustrated Arteta said he will now have to be “very flexible” with his attacking tactics.

arts.ttl: Club ‘optimistic’ of agreeing deal with Arsenal man this week – May tempt Gunners with transfer offer
arts.sum: Flamengo are optimistic about the negotiations to sign Jorginho from Arsenal and want to sign him to a pre-contract agreement in the next few days. That’s according to GOAL Brasil, who report that Flamengo are convinced Jorginho will be a standout in Brazilian football.
